label.coffee.sensory_text: A buttery Colombian lot to enjoy all day with notes of honey, red apple and lingering toffee.; This coffee gives us juicy, bright acidity with a lingering Panela sugar sweetness.; It's great black, and with the addition of milk you will experience sweet chocolate and nougat flavors.
label.coffee.producer_text: All Day is a community coffee.; It was grown in Huila, Colombia by neighboring local producers and blended using color sorters, density separation and experienced quality assurance professionals.; Right now 100% of All Day is made up of a coffee named 'El Nevado del Huila' named after Colombia's highest volcano and sourced by the team at The Coffee Quest.; Producers that contribute to this community coffee grow mostly Castillo, Caturra and Colombia - El Nevado del Huila is a blend of their washed processed lots.; Lot Name → El Nevado del Huila; Producers → Small-scale producers from Huila; Location → Huila, Colombia; Altitude: 1,600 - 1,900 masl; Varieties: Castillo, Caturra, Colombia; Process: Washed
